title: Volunteerism
questions: What springs to mind when you hear the word 'volunteer'?
Do you often volunteer to do things?
Have you ever volunteered to do something and then regretted volunteering?
What kind of voluntary work would you like to do?
What would the world be like if no one volunteered to do anything?
Has anyone ever volunteered your services and you didn't want them to?
Would you like to work as a volunteer overseas?
What was your last volunteer effort?
Does your town have lots of volunteer schemes?
When was the last time someone volunteered to help you?
Do you think we should all volunteer to do something good for others?
December 5th is International Volunteer Day. What do you think happens or should happen on this day?
How do you feel about yourself after you've finished a task you volunteered for?
Could all of the world's problems be solved through volunteerism?
What would you like to see more people volunteer for?
Are volunteers special?
Are you always the first to volunteer?
Would you ever volunteer to help the lion tamer or the fire-eater in a circus?
Do you think doing voluntary work is good for your resume?
Would you join the volunteer army of your country?
